title: Update user icon to single person style in attack path template

requirements.text: Replace the user icon image in the attack path template with a single person icon in a simple icon style (silhouette or outlined figure). This icon should serve as a visual element only with no interactive behavior.

quotes: Change the user icon image into a single person

acceptanceCriteria: The user icon in AttackPathIcon.tsx displays a single person instead of the current user image
The icon uses a simple, clean icon style (silhouette or outlined figure)
The icon is non-interactive and serves as a visual element only
The icon maintains consistent sizing with other attack path icons

constraints: Do not modify the interactive drag-and-drop functionality of attack path icons
Maintain consistency with existing icon sizing and positioning in the attack path canvas
nonGoals: Making the user icon interactive or clickable
Changing other icon types in the attack path template
Modifying the backend diagram state structure

required: Simple single person icon silhouette in dark color on transparent background (user-single.dim_128x128.png)
